title: pericallis aurita
intro: Pericallis aurita, also known as the "Dinner-plate flower," is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, native to the Canary Islands. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pericallis aurita include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Pericallis aurita typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
